Overall quite soild, good rng. I did die in boomslang and had to redo bridge skip/ pixie proxy once.
Each passing day is one more day where I get closer to the level of a human being. For now, I'm still playing with stumps instead of hands, but at least there's some progress.
Dont mind the guy talking in the background and hey PB by 2min

Sort of a "one and done" kinda run here, kind of, I did one the other day but i got 59 and just had a lot of rough areas that I just wanted to clean up so I gave it another shot. 

Much better overall - large time loss from RNG split - but I was able to clean up on my previous run much more in the late game which saved a decent chunk of time.

Shout out to the dropping floor in chamber 2 in my first run which lost me 2 minutes for just, the trick not working and me getting mega tilted not understanding how I was messing it up XD

Big shout out to the glitchless tutorial playlist - I tried everything I felt  comfortable going for, which left out maybe 4-5 tricks but yeah. Poor Aragog web cutting was unfortunate. could have had 55 if id had less time loss from the RNG but yeah, as a one and done I'm pretty happy with this!

The time at the last loading screen is 56:02.84
Pretty happy with my pace, it got better after bingo glitchless tournament. Malfoy was bad, and there’s timesave on many splits

Mod note: Insane

Finally sub hour, still needs some work, but for now I am happy with this. Later need to practice fast Aragog, fast Snak tech, Mushroom stack, and clean up Dumbledore skip in future runs. Very tight health with fall from staircase towards Slytherin Dungeon. Missed door cycle once and skipped Pixie Bounce in Chamber 1. Movement could be better in some areas too.

Mod note: I would advice you to set up loadless for your Splits, you may do so by right clicking your splits, going into edit splits and selecting the game, then setting up the comparison to game time instead of real time, ggs!!
